scripts.build: npm run build -w @esbenwiberg/repofit && npm run build -w @esbenwiberg/corpus-default
scripts.demo: npm run build && node packages/engine/dist/cli/index.js check --probe agent.guidance-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @esbenwiberg/repofit && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @esbenwiberg/repofit && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
